name: Vonage Communications API
description: Vonage provides a unified communications platform for sending SMS messages, WhatsApp messages, making voice calls, verifying phone numbers, and performing number insight lookups. Use this API to programmatically send notifications, implement two-factor authentication, manage phone numbers, and build communication workflows across multiple channels.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Send a message via SMS, MMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, or Viber using the Messages API v1. Specify channel, message type, recipient, and content.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a previously sent message by its UUID.

capabilities.name: verify_request_create
capabilities.description: Start a verification request by sending a code to a user via SMS, WhatsApp, voice, or email using Verify v2.

capabilities.name: verify_request_check
capabilities.description: Check a user-submitted code against an active Verify v2 request to confirm their identity.

capabilities.name: verify_request_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an in-progress Verify v2 request before it completes all workflow steps.

capabilities.name: verify_request_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current status and details of a Verify v2 request by its request_id.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_create
capabilities.description: Create an outbound voice call to a phone number or SIP endpoint. Configure answer URL with NCCO for call flow.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_list
capabilities.description: List all voice calls associated with your Vonage application, with optional filtering by status and date range.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific voice call by its UUID.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_update
capabilities.description: Modify an in-progress call by transferring it to a new NCCO, muting, unmuting, earmuffing, or hanging up.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_stream_create
capabilities.description: Stream an audio file into an active voice call.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_stream_delete
capabilities.description: Stop streaming audio into an active voice call.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_talk_create
capabilities.description: Play text-to-speech into an active voice call.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_talk_delete
capabilities.description: Stop text-to-speech playback in an active voice call.

capabilities.name: voice_calls_dtmf_create
capabilities.description: Send DTMF tones into an active voice call.

capabilities.name: numbers_list
capabilities.description: List all phone numbers currently owned by your Vonage account with optional filtering by country, pattern, or search pattern.

capabilities.name: numbers_search
capabilities.description: Search for available phone numbers to purchase, filtered by country, type, features, and pattern.

capabilities.name: numbers_buy
capabilities.description: Purchase an available phone number for your Vonage account.

capabilities.name: numbers_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel (release) a phone number from your Vonage account.

capabilities.name: numbers_update
capabilities.description: Update the configuration of a phone number, such as linking it to an application or setting webhook URLs.

capabilities.name: number_insight_basic_get
capabilities.description: Get basic information about a phone number including country, international format, and national format.

capabilities.name: number_insight_standard_get
capabilities.description: Get standard information about a phone number including carrier, porting status, and roaming information.

capabilities.name: number_insight_advanced_get
capabilities.description: Get advanced information about a phone number including reachability, validity, and real-time data.

capabilities.name: applications_list
capabilities.description: List all Vonage applications in your account. Applications configure how Vonage interacts with your webhooks for voice, messages, and other features.

capabilities.name: applications_create
capabilities.description: Create a new Vonage application with capabilities configuration for voice, messages, RTC, and VBC.

capabilities.name: applications_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Vonage application by its ID.

capabilities.name: applications_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing Vonage application's name, capabilities, or webhook configuration.

capabilities.name: applications_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a Vonage application by its ID. This cannot be undone.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_list
capabilities.description: List all subaccounts belonging to your primary Vonage account.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subaccount under your primary Vonage account for billing and permission isolation.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific subaccount by its API key.

capabilities.name: subaccounts_update
capabilities.description: Update a subaccount's name, status (active/suspended), or usage limits.
